scripts.mp4:transcode: ffmpeg -y -i assets/in.mp4 -c:v libx264 -preset veryfast -g 60 -keyint_min 60 -sc_threshold 0 -b:v 4M -maxrate 4M -bufsize 8M -c:a aac -b:a 128k dist/output.mp4
scripts.thumbs: shx mkdir -p dist/thumbs && ffmpeg -y -i assets/in.mp4 -vf fps=1,scale=320:-2 dist/thumbs/%03d.jpg
scripts.dash:cmaf: ffmpeg -y -i assets/in.mp4 -map 0:v -map 0:a -c:v libx264 -preset veryfast -g 60 -keyint_min 60 -sc_threshold 0 -b:v 4000k -maxrate 4000k -bufsize 8000k -c:a aac -b:a 128k -f dash -use_template 1 -use_timeline 0 -init_seg_name init-$RepresentationID$.mp4 -media_seg_name chunk-$RepresentationID$-$Number%05d$.m4s -seg_duration 2 -adaptation_sets "id=0,streams=v id=1,streams=a" dist/dash/stream.mpd
scripts.clean:ff: shx rm -rf ffout && shx mkdir -p ffout
scripts.ffmpeg:test: yarn clean:ff && ffmpeg -hide_banner -y -i public/assets/sample.mp4 -c:v libx264 -preset veryfast -g 60 -keyint_min 60 -sc_threshold 0 -b:v 1M -maxrate 1M -bufsize 2M -c:a aac -b:a 128k ffout/output.mp4 && ffprobe -v error -show_entries format=duration:stream=codec_name -of json ffout/output.mp4
scripts.hls:cmaf: ffmpeg -y -i public/assets/sample.mp4 -map 0:v -map 0:a -c:v libx264 -preset veryfast -g 60 -keyint_min 60 -sc_threshold 0 -b:v 4M -maxrate 4M -bufsize 8M -c:a aac -b:a 128k -f hls -hls_time 2 -hls_segment_type fmp4 -hls_flags independent_segments -master_pl_name master.m3u8 -hls_fmp4_init_filename init.mp4 -hls_segment_filename "ffout/hls/seg_%03d.m4s" ffout/hls/stream.m3u8
scripts.hls:publish: shx rm -rf public/media/hls && shx mkdir -p public/media && shx cp -r ffout/hls public/media/hls
